localizations.title: Professor Noside's Animal-O-Matic
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Carefully look at the T-Rex skeleton.
localizations.hint_0: Until you have recharged your Animal-O-Matic with an atomic battery, you will get no reaction from the Professor.
localizations.hint_1: Being the size of a fly, you can sneak in almost anywhere.
localizations.hint_3_first: Your overdeveloped sense of smell is a formidable weapon. What smell do you want tracking?
localizations.hint_3: Once your radioactive safe is open, sniff the liquid from the atomic battery and follow its smell throughout the house, without losing its trace.
localizations.hint_4: Find something to sharpen this pencil. The solution is right under your nose… and above your chin.
localizations.hint_5: With no feathers, Michael will never be able to fly. But how can you attach feathers to such smooth and soft skin?
localizations.hint_6: The water is rapidly rising. Hurry! Get out of the living room.
localizations.hint_7: You have always dreamed of having cats' eyes: seeing in the dark will be useful to make progress.
localizations.hint_9: You must make a boat. Even a beginner at Origami would be able to do this...
localizations.hint_10: You are not alone; you hear snoring in this room...
localizations.hint_12: Could the smell lead you to the battery? It would require a strong sense of smell.
localizations.hint_13: This pencil will reveal something in your notebook. Make sure you shade the right spot.
localizations.hint_14: You would need to fly to reach this hatch.
localizations.hint_15: While inside Maurice's body, you're an excellent swimmer.
localizations.hint_16: Only the feathers are missing. Where can you find them?
localizations.hint_18: And what if you popped a bubble to scare Maurice?
localizations.hint_20: After this long rest, Ryker is in great shape: he could move mountains.
localizations.hint_23: One would have to be small enough to get to the living room through the keyhole.
localizations.hint_24: Like all flies, you are attracted to brightly lit things.
localizations.hint_27: A sheet of paper that folds easily.
localizations.hint_28: If you can't find something to lure Leo out of his doghouse, he won't be of any help to you.
localizations.hint_30: The buttons of this safe have the same colors as your wallpaper. Is it a coincidence?
localizations.hint_35: Joy grew tall in her pot. Each of her heads seems to be pointing at something on the wallpaper behind.
localizations.hint_38: And who's gonna get the bark-mitzvah? Eh? Who's gonna get it?
localizations.hint_39: Michael, or at least his body, will now be able to help you continue.
localizations.hint_40: It's a flood, not suitable for bad swimmers.
localizations.hint_45: You no longer remember the solution to this maze, but you wrote it down in your notebook. You must find a way to recover it, but first, you must resolve the issue with the flooding.
localizations.hint_48: How would the plant react to the sound of a bug flying above her? Make sure to keep your distance…
localizations.hint_49: This piece of wallpaper seems to complete the one behind the plant.
localizations.hint_50: The only thing left to do is to take control of James to recover the battery. But, he will always be one step ahead.
localizations.hint_53: All ships must have their captain! Where's he hiding?
localizations.hint_55: You see something fidget above the first-aid kit.
localizations.hint_57: To rewind the audiotape, you must first find something to turn the audiotape's reels.
localizations.hint_58: You will not manage to open this door in the body of a fly. It requires a bestial strength.
localizations.hint_62: There is no need to touch the screen to turn this valve.
localizations.hint_63: Now that you can fly, you can reach spots that previously were inaccessible.
localizations.hint_64: With a sheet of paper, you could do wonders.
localizations.hint_65: Maurice presides from Cocow's head. What if you popped a bubble to scare Maurice?
localizations.hint_66: Stop wondering what it would be like to be a dog. Become one!
localizations.hint_70: Put the tape back in the tape recorder (machine 79) and follow the instructions.
localizations.hint_72: Unlike most bubble gums on the market, your favorite one makes huge bubbles. Still, you'd need to have powerful cheeks.
localizations.hint_73: Maurice the fish, or at least his body, will now be able to assist you.
localizations.hint_74: This door is of a formidable sturdiness. Except through the cat flap, it is impassable.
localizations.hint_78: Liederkranz is now free to leave the kitchen. It might be helpful to you.
localizations.hint_80: A bird stuck in his maze-cage and a fish stuck in a cranial fishbowl. Bummer! And this cow looking at you, has something quite hypnotic about her…
localizations.hint_82: When you take a closer look, you notice a writing impression on the right-hand page. You must find a way to reveal the indentations, but first, you must resolve the issue with the flooding.
localizations.hint_88: There has been a fly infestation all summer. They sneak in everywhere.
localizations.hint_90_first: You will have to blow more air to inflate this bubble.
localizations.hint_90: Blow air on the mic of your device to inflate the bubble until it pops.
localizations.hint_91_first: Set the boat afloat… In other words, put the boat on the water!
localizations.hint_91: Superimpose the boat on the water of the bathroom (55).
localizations.hint_98: The maze-cage solution! Do you need to reverse something again?
localizations.answer_hint_1: Take advantage of your small fly-like size (1) to sneak in through the keyhole of the kitchen door (23).
localizations.answer_hint_3: Scan the stain produced by the atomic liquid (12) to sniff the smell sample with the camera of your device. Then, follow the smell IN SEQUENTIAL ORDER, scanning the attic with your camera (77), then the bathroom (S), the living room (10), and finally the yard (80).
localizations.answer_hint_4: Use your rodent teeth (9) to sharpen the pencil lead (4).
localizations.answer_hint_5: Coat Michael (5) with honey (11). Yes, yes, you're gonna understand why!
localizations.answer_hint_6: Leave the house with Liederkranz (6) through the cat flap (74).
localizations.answer_hint_7: Scan the dark kitchen (C) with the camera of your device to see more clearly.
localizations.answer_hint_9: Once your pretty little paper boat is on the water (53), place the captain inside (9).
localizations.answer_hint_10: Transfer, using the Animal-O-Matic, your mind into the bear's body. Indeed, he's very much alive!
localizations.answer_hint_12: Once out of his doghouse, use Leo to detect the smell of the liquid from the atomic battery and follow its trail.
localizations.answer_hint_13: Use the pencil (13) to shade the right-hand page of the notebook (85, not 82) and thus reveal the maze-cage solution.
localizations.answer_hint_15: Use your powerful fins (15) to swim up the torrent that is pouring down the stairs (40).
localizations.answer_hint_16: Stick the pillow's feathers (47) to Michael's honeyed skin (16).
localizations.answer_hint_18: Take advantage of your superpowerful jaws (18) to chew your favorite bubble gum (72).
localizations.answer_hint_20: Push the kitchen door blocked by your Professor body (58), using your exceptional strength (20).
localizations.answer_hint_27: Use this sheet of paper (27) to make one of your best origamis (64) ever.
localizations.answer_hint_35: By correctly placing the four-headed Joy (35) on the wallpaper's background (48 and 49), her 4 tongues point to the colors, from top to bottom, Purple/Orange/Green/Blue. Use this combination to open the atomic safe (machine 30).
localizations.answer_hint_38: Use this bone (38) to lure Leo out of his doghouse (28).
localizations.answer_hint_39: Grab the Animal-O-Matic and transfer into Michael's small body!
localizations.answer_hint_48: Once the tape is rewound and returned to where it belongs, press Play and move your device, screen face up, above the plant (48).
localizations.answer_hint_49: Place this piece of wallpaper (49) above the other piece (48) to complete the pattern.
localizations.answer_hint_50: James moves following the same sequence. Anticipate his next move and then aim and fire at him with the Animal-O-Matic.
localizations.answer_hint_53: Once inside James' body (9 - thanks to the Animal-O-Matic on card 55), sail through the bathroom aboard the boat (53).
localizations.answer_hint_55: With the Animal-O-Matic, aim above the first-aid kit (that's right, above the card): if the mirror reflection is to be believed, this is where James is.
localizations.answer_hint_57: Use the pencil (13) to rewind the tape (57).
localizations.answer_hint_58: Transfer your mind into this bear's body using the Animal-O-Matic. Indeed, he's very much alive.
localizations.answer_hint_62: Turn your device clockwise to close this valve.
localizations.answer_hint_63: Using this bird's body (63) you are able to fly up to the attic hatch (14) and pull the handle.
localizations.answer_hint_66: Grab the Animal-O-Matic and transfer into Leo's body!
localizations.answer_hint_70: In machine 79, keep the CIRCLE and TRIANGLE keys pressed down, and press EJECT 3 times to insert the tape. Then, press PLAY: you will hear a sound that will prove useful sometime during the adventure.
localizations.answer_hint_73: Transfer into Maurice using the Animal-O-Matic.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Transfer your mind into Liederkranz's body once more using the Animal-O-Matic.
localizations.answer_hint_80: Take this opportunity to transfer into the impressive cow's body.
localizations.answer_hint_88: Use your Animal-O-Matic to transfer your mind into the body of one of these flies.
localizations.answer_hint_90: There is a hidden blue +8 in the POP. Scare Maurice (65) with the POP sound (+8). Take card 73.
localizations.answer_hint_91: If you superimpose the bottom part of the boat (91) on the surface of the water in the bathroom (55), the addition 45+8 will appear.
localizations.answer_hint_98: You probably got your left and right mixed up once more. The solution is: right / bottom / left / bottom / right / top / left / left. Enter these instructions in machine 45 (the maze-cage).
localizations.machine_3: You run swiftly, following the smell that leads you to the middle of the forest. Finally, you see the battery.
localizations.machine_30: This is the right combination. The atomic safe opens.
localizations.machine_62: After a few turns, the valve is completely closed.
localizations.animalomatic_0: You fire and, and, and… nothing! Without the atomic battery, you will never recover your human shape…
localizations.animalomatic_intro: Uh oh… Now, you can flip this card over.
localizations.animalomatic_10: In full flight, you leave your tiny fly body, and project into the sturdy body of this bear.
localizations.animalomatic_11: Do you really want to transfer your mind into the drawing of this bee and remain stuck forever?
localizations.animalomatic_39: You aim your Animal-O-Matic at Michael and fire: Chirp chirp.
localizations.animalomatic_45: Michael is locked behind bars. He won't be of any use as long as the maze-cage is closed.
localizations.animalomatic_48: To transfer into a plant, you need a Plant-O-Matic. Duh! You must find some other way to draw this plant's attention.
localizations.animalomatic_50: You anticipate James’ next move and transfer again into his body. Finally, the battery is yours. You immediately place it inside the Animal-O-Matic, which starts to load slowly.
localizations.animalomatic_55_miroir: Nice try, but this is only James' reflection in the mirror. Unfortunately, the shot does not ricochet.
localizations.animalomatic_65: There's not much you can do while in Maurice's body, stuck in the cranial fishbowl of this cow.
localizations.animalomatic_73: As the explosion propels Maurice out of the fishbowl, you draw the Animal-O-Matic and fire at him.
localizations.animalomatic_74: You're losing your marbles… The Animal-O-Matic only works on live animals.
localizations.animalomatic_77: The Animal-O-Matic has the ability to transfer one's mind into the body of a live animal.
localizations.animalomatic_80: Then again, you couldn't miss her…
localizations.animalomatic_88: You fire in the direction of this swarm of flies.
localizations.animalomatic_intro_2: You recover the Animal-O-Matic that easily adapts to your cat body. Rather handy...
localizations.animalomatic_charging_hint: You here have the choice to either wait (1'30) during the loading or to plug in your charger to save time. The choice is yours.
localizations.animalomatic_end_hint: There's nothing for you but to return inside your Professor's body.
localizations.animalomatic_end_answer: Aim and fire on your Professor's body (0) to send your mind back into him.
localizations.machine_45_almost: Yes, it is the same combination as the one in your notebook. But do we need to remind you that it is you, Professor Noside, who wrote it down at the time?
localizations.hint_62_noAccel: If you turn the valve, the water should eventually stop flowing.
localizations.answer_hint_62_noAccel: Turn the valve with your finger until the water stops flowing.
localizations.hint_90_first_noMic: This bubble will pop if it inflates too much.
localizations.hint_90_noMic: Press the bubble with your finger to inflate it until it pops.
localizations.end:
FWOOSH!
A gigantic flash comes out of the animal-o-matic, and suddenly you are inside the professor’s body. As you regain your bright wits, you congratulate yourself, thinking about giving yourself a well deserved bath.
localizations.machine_79_step1: You open the tape recorder and retrieve the tape.
localizations.machine_79_step2: The tape is in place. Discard card 70.
localizations.machine_79_step3: Hearing the mosquito, the plant grows and starts to move, trying to catch her prey.
